ItacPersonItem.Notes: Painter. Also member of the Congregazione dei Virtuosi al Pantheon. Twice Prince of Accademia di San Luca, see H. Roettgen, `Cesari, Giuseppe`, in DBI. According to Franchi (1994), p. 85, Cesari created the Accademia degli Uniti in his house, for the purpose of staging theatre performances.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
